label: Agent infrastructure
summary: Coordination, recall, and parallel-orchestration tooling for working with coding agents — 10 repos. `ai-champions-kit` is the PUBLIC tiered installer; ai-hive, claude-recall-cli, claude-orchestrator, worktree-orchestrator, browse-tool, and claude-docs-toolkit are the private substrate.
primary_persona: P1 Reviewer + P2 Developer evaluating whether the substrate is real, working, and citable
